## Description

A clear description of the feature or tool you'd like added.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Platform

- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] All platforms

## Proposed Solution

How you think this should work (install method, config, category placement).

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've considered.
